Record Class LootEntry

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.fish.LootEntry
public record LootEntry(String id, String externalItemId, org.bukkit.Material material, String displayName, String description, Rarity rarity, int weight, List<org.bukkit.block.Biome> biomes, double minWeight, double maxWeight, Integer minY, Integer maxY, Long minTime, Long maxTime) extends Record
Represents a single entry in the fishing loot table.

Entries are either standard fish (material, display name, and description are populated) or cross-plugin external items resolved via the ItemRegistry (externalItemId is non-null, material and display fields will be null).

Restriction Dimensions

  • Biome — list of biomes where the fish can appear, or empty for global
  • Y Coordinate — optional min/max Y range for the fishing hook position
  • Time of Day — optional min/max world time in ticks (0–24000)

Time of Day Reference

  • 0 — Dawn
  • 6000 — Noon
  • 12000 — Dusk
  • 18000 — Midnight

Overnight time ranges are supported — if minTime > maxTime, the range wraps around midnight. For example, minTime: 18000, maxTime: 6000 means the fish is catchable from dusk through to morning.

See Also:
  • LootService
  • LootTableConfigLoader

  • Constructor Details

    • LootEntry

      public LootEntry(String id, String externalItemId, org.bukkit.Material material, String displayName, String description, Rarity rarity, int weight, List<org.bukkit.block.Biome> biomes, double minWeight, double maxWeight, Integer minY, Integer maxY, Long minTime, Long maxTime)
      Constructs a new LootEntry.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier for the entry
      externalItemId - namespaced item ID resolved via the ItemRegistry (e.g. "sylphian-crates:legendary_key"); null for standard fish entries
      material - the item material to use; null for external item entries
      displayName - the MiniMessage formatted name displayed to players; null for external item entries
      description - the MiniMessage formatted lore description; null for external item entries
      rarity - the entry rarity
      weight - relative weight in the weighted loot pool
      biomes - list of biomes where this entry can be caught, empty for no restriction
      minWeight - minimum physical catch weight in kg
      maxWeight - maximum physical catch weight in kg
      minY - minimum Y coordinate to catch this entry, or null for no restriction
      maxY - maximum Y coordinate to catch this entry, or null for no restriction
      minTime - minimum world time in ticks to catch this entry, or null for no restriction
      maxTime - maximum world time in ticks to catch this entry, or null for no restriction

  • Method Details

    • isGlobal

      public boolean isGlobal()
      Returns true if this fish has no biome restriction.

    • hasYRestriction

      public boolean hasYRestriction()
      Returns true if this fish has a Y coordinate restriction configured.
      Returns:
      true if minY or maxY is set

    • hasTimeRestriction

      public boolean hasTimeRestriction()
      Returns true if this fish has a time of day restriction configured.
      Returns:
      true if minTime or maxTime is set

    • appliesToBiome

      public boolean appliesToBiome(org.bukkit.block.Biome biome)
      Checks if this fish can be caught in the specified biome.
      Parameters:
      biome - the biome to check
      Returns:
      true if catchable in the biome, false otherwise

    • appliesToY

      public boolean appliesToY(double y)
      Checks if this fish can be caught at the given Y coordinate. If no Y restriction is configured, always returns true.
      Parameters:
      y - the Y coordinate of the fishing hook
      Returns:
      true if catchable at this height

    • appliesToTime

      public boolean appliesToTime(long worldTime)
      Checks if this fish can be caught at the given Minecraft time of day. Time is measured in ticks (0 = dawn, 6000 = noon, 12000 = dusk, 18000 = midnight). Supports overnight ranges where minTime is greater than maxTime e.g. minTime: 18000, maxTime: 6000 means dusk through to morning.
      Parameters:
      worldTime - the current world time in ticks
      Returns:
      true if catchable at this time

    • rollWeight

      public double rollWeight(Random random)
      Rolls a random physical weight for the fish based on its min/max range.
      Parameters:
      random - the random source
      Returns:
      the rolled weight in kg

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
